# Zooza Help Centre

> Zooza is a class management platform for children's activity providers, sports clubs, and studios.
> This help centre covers setup, bookings, payments, communication, and platform administration.
> All articles are in English. Slovak notes (marked SK:) appear in articles relevant to SK/CZ deployments.

## About Zooza

Zooza helps activity providers manage classes, trials, bookings, payments, and client communication.
Key concepts: Programmes (course templates), Classes (scheduled instances), Sessions (individual dates),
Bookings (client enrolments), Payment Plans (instalment schedules), Make-up Sessions (absence replacements).

## Programmes

### Setup guides

- [Auto-enrollment](https://help.zooza.online/programmes/auto-enrollment): Auto-enrollment is used for efficient programme enrollment for existing clients with a pre-filled booking form. This...

- [Retention](https://help.zooza.online/programmes/retention): Retention is a Zooza feature that automatically sends a re-engagement link to clients whose trial was lost or whose...
- [Trial sessions](https://help.zooza.online/programmes/trial-sessions): Trial sessions are a great way to show what your programmes have to offer. You will allow clients to get a better...

- [FAQ — Programmes](https://help.zooza.online/programmes/faq-programmes): No. Programmes cannot be deleted directly in the app.

## Payments

### Setup guides

- [Setting up billing periods](https://help.zooza.online/payments/billing-periods): Billing periods are used for better orientation and overview in which period the programmes were held and therefore...
- [Email-notification payment matching](https://help.zooza.online/payments/email-payment-notifications): Email-notification pairing is a faster, lower-maintenance alternative to GoCardless for automatic payment matching....
- [Fakturoid Integration](https://help.zooza.online/payments/fakturoid-invoices): Fakturoid is a Czech and Slovak cloud invoicing platform. When connected, Zooza creates invoices directly in your...
- [Invoicing in Zooza — Overview](https://help.zooza.online/payments/invoicing-overview): Zooza tracks payments and can generate invoices for course registrations and product purchases. Every account comes...
- [Oblio Integration](https://help.zooza.online/payments/oblio-invoices): Oblio is a Romanian cloud accounting platform. When connected, Zooza creates invoices directly in your Oblio account,...
- [SmartBill Integration](https://help.zooza.online/payments/smartbill-invoices): SmartBill is a Romanian cloud invoicing platform. When connected, Zooza creates invoices directly in your SmartBill...
- [Számlázz.hu Integration](https://help.zooza.online/payments/szamlazz-invoices): Számlázz.hu is a major Hungarian cloud invoicing platform. When connected, Zooza creates legally compliant Hungarian...
- [Xero Integration](https://help.zooza.online/payments/xero-integration): Xero is an international cloud accounting platform. The Zooza–Xero integration is the most feature-rich of all invoice...

### FAQ

- [Email and Communication FAQ](https://help.zooza.online/communication/email-communication-faq): No. You do not need to enter the country code when saving a client's phone number. Zooza automatically applies the...
- [WhatsApp FAQ](https://help.zooza.online/communication/whatsapp-faq): No. They receive WhatsApp messages and follow links to your website/Client Profile.

## Settings

### Setup guides

- [Add the Zooza app to your phone’s desktop](https://help.zooza.online/settings/add-zooza-app-to-phone): If you use the Zooza app most often from your phone, you can simplify access by adding it as a shortcut to your home...
- [Creating and managing locations](https://help.zooza.online/settings/creating-a-location): Locations are the physical venues where your classes take place. Every class requires a location, and the location name...

- [Notifications Center](https://help.zooza.online/settings/notifications-center): The Notification Center is used to notify you as an administrator or your colleagues.

- [Locations and Venues FAQ](https://help.zooza.online/settings/locations-and-venues-faq): Location is a required field on a class — you cannot leave it blank. You can only replace it with a different location.
- [Login and Account FAQ](https://help.zooza.online/settings/login-and-account-faq): Account deletion must be handled by Zooza support. Contact support@zooza.online and request account deletion. Once...

- [Roles and Permissions FAQ](https://help.zooza.online/settings/roles-and-permissions-faq): Zooza offers six predefined roles with different levels of access:
- [Subscription and Billing FAQ](https://help.zooza.online/settings/subscription-faq): 1. Click your name/profile in the Zooza app — top right on mobile, bottom left on desktop.
